label: Army Engineers Fast-Track Permits Under Trump

comments.text: The Army Corps’ draft analysis admits the Line 5 tunnel project would destroy wetlands and could contaminate the water. Yet they’re still fast-tracking the project. Building a massive, experimental oil tunnel is a disaster waiting to happen for Tribes, for Michigan, and for the Great Lakes.
The federal government has just said they are likely to fast track the Line 5 oil tunnel underneath the Great Lakes due to President Trump’s "energy emergency" executive order.
